title: The Apartment Above Mine
content: For several weeks, strange noises had been coming from the apartment above Noah’s almost every night. Sometimes he heard heavy footsteps late at night, while other times furniture seemed to move across the floor for hours. At first, Noah tried to ignore the sounds, but eventually his lack of sleep started affecting his mood and work performance. One evening, he finally decided to speak to his upstairs neighbor politely. To his surprise, the neighbor explained that he worked night shifts and had recently adopted a large dog that was still adjusting to the apartment. After their conversation, the neighbor became more careful about the noise, and the situation slowly improved.
